title: Quality of life improvements and some other changes

texts: Added an Identities Only and an E.G.Os Compressed display type to builds for people who may prefer that display type.
Sin distribution panel in builds has been upgraded to keyword/sin distribution for easier viewing of keywords.

Status descriptions are now included when searching for statuses in dropdowns (e.g. identities page), instead of only searching names. (Testing how people use this for now. Can be reverted if people prefer names only)
Added a luxcavation cheatsheet at the bottom of the Dispense and Training Calculator.
Removed the horizontal scrollbar on collections and instead added a small animation on hover. Also improved the dragging behavior.
Fixed an issue when loading reviews where it could load the Latest tab instead of Active/Top when newly opening reviews and you had to swap tabs to load the right list properly.
Added local time beside KST on timers.
Added a popular builds tab on the rating and reviews modal.
Slightly extended the tooltip on additional details when making builds.
Removed the description section when displaying builds/collections/md plans that have none provided.
